query.value:
select a.gubun   
      ,a.reason 
      ,a.keyword
      ,string_agg(a.include_keyword,',') as include_keyword
      ,a.exclude_keyword 
      ,string_agg(a.include_keyword,'||') as api_include_keyword
      , case when replace(a.exclude_keyword ,',','||') = '' then '%23%40VK%23S1%23%EC%A0%95%EC%B9%98'
            else replace(a.exclude_keyword ,',','||')  || '%23%40VK%23S1%23%EC%A0%95%EC%B9%98'
            end as api_exclude_keyword_new
      ,replace(a.exclude_keyword ,',','||') as api_exclude_keyword
  from (
		select gubun   
		      ,reason 
		      ,keyword		    
		      ,exclude_keyword 
		      ,case when regexp_match( include_keyword,',') is not null then '('||replace(include_keyword,',','&&')||')'
		            else include_keyword
		        end include_keyword         
		  from cd_ods.tb_srm_news_keyword
       ) a              
group by  a.gubun   
      ,a.reason 
      ,a.keyword  
       ,a.exclude_keyword 
order by a.gubun, a.reason, a.keyword
;

delete from cd_ods.tb_srm_news_data where date between '@{variables('date')}' and '@{variables('date2')}';


insert into cd_ods.tb_srm_news_data
(
 "date" 
	,gubun
	,reason
	,keyword
	,include_keyword
	,exclude_keyword 
	,title
	,url
	,writername 
	,writerrealname 
	,documentdate
)
select "date" 
	,gubun
	,reason
	,keyword
	,include_keyword
	,exclude_keyword 
	,title
	,url
	,writername 
	,writerrealname 
	,documentdate
 from cd_ods.tb_srm_news_data_temp
 where date between '@{variables('date')}' and '@{variables('date2')}'
 and writername in
 (
  'KBS'
,'SBSBiz'
,'강원도민일보'
,'강원일보'
,'경향신문'
,'국민일보'
,'국제신문'
,'노컷뉴스'
,'농민신문'
,'뉴스1'
,'뉴시스'
,'대전일보'
,'데일리안'
,'동아일보'
,'매일경제'
,'머니투데이'
,'문화일보'
,'부산일보'
,'아시아경제'
,'연합뉴스'
,'이데일리'
,'조선일보'
,'중앙일보'
,'파이낸셜뉴스'
,'한겨레'
,'한국경제'
,'한국일보'
,'헤럴드경제'
 );

select 1 as su;

select a.gubun 
      ,a.keyword
      ,string_agg(a.inculde_keyword,',') as inculde_keyword
      ,a.inculde_keyword_and
      ,inculde_keyword_add||string_agg(a.inculde_keyword,'||')||inculde_keyword_add2  as api_inculde_keyword
      ,string_agg(a.db_inculde_keyword,',') as db_inculde_keyword
  from (
	    select gubun
	          ,keyword		        
	          ,inculde_keyword_and
	          ,inculde_keyword
	          ,case when length(inculde_keyword_and) !=0 then inculde_keyword_and||'&&(' else '' end  inculde_keyword_add
              ,case when length(inculde_keyword_and) !=0 then ')' else '' end inculde_keyword_add2
	          ,replace(inculde_keyword,'''','''''')  as db_inculde_keyword
	          ,row_number() over (partition by gubun, keyword, inculde_keyword_and)/20 as cnt 
	      from cd_portal.tb_kimchi_roh_news_keyword 
		) a 
 where a.gubun = '김치'
 group by a.gubun 
      ,a.keyword
      ,a.inculde_keyword_and
      ,a.inculde_keyword_add
      ,a.inculde_keyword_add2
 order by keyword

select keyword     
        ,exclude_keyword
        ,include_keyword
        ,include_keyword_and
        ,case when include_keyword_and is not null then '('||include_keyword_and||')&('||include_keyword||')'
              else include_keyword
          end include_keyword_api
   from  cd_ods.tb_global_news_keyword

delete from cd_ods.tb_global_news_data where date between '@{variables('date')}' and '@{variables('date2')}';

insert into cd_ods.tb_global_news_data
(
 "date" 
	,gubun
	,keyword
	,include_keyword
	,exclude_keyword 
	,include_keyword_and
	,title
	,url
	,writername 
	,writerrealname 
	,documentdate
	,select_include_keyword
)
     select  a.date
	,a.gubun
	,a.keyword
	,a.include_keyword
	,a.exclude_keyword 
	,a.include_keyword_and
	,a.title
	,a.url
	,a.writername 
	,a.writerrealname 
	,a.documentdate
            ,array_to_string ( array_agg(distinct a.select_inculde_keyword),',' ) as select_include_keyword            
        from (
		         select "date" 
						,gubun	
						,keyword
						,include_keyword
						,exclude_keyword 
						,include_keyword_and
						,title
						,url
						,writername 
						,writerrealname 
						,documentdate
					    ,regexp_matches(title||' '||content , replace(include_keyword,'||','|') ,'g') as select_inculde_keyword			   
						from cd_ods.tb_global_news_data_temp					
					where date between '@{variables('date')}' and '@{variables('date2')}'
					 and replace(writername,' ','') not in
								 (
								  '일간스포츠'
								  , 'MBC연예'
								  , '오마이뉴스'
								  , '코메디닷컴'
								  , '스포티비뉴스'
								  , '연합뉴스TN'
								  , '스타뉴스'
								  , 'OSEN'
								 )
				--	and title ='백화점부터 도서관까지…기능성 천장재 도입 사례 확산'
                 ) a
     group by  a.date
	,a.gubun
	,a.keyword
	,a.include_keyword
	,a.exclude_keyword 
	,a.include_keyword_and
	,a.title
	,a.url
	,a.writername 
	,a.writerrealname 
	,a.documentdate    ;            
                 
select 1 as su;

select trim(regexp_replace( 사업장명, '[#|&|"|''|�]', '', 'g')) as query from cd_ods.tb_cic_restaurant_info_t where 영업상태명 ='영업/정상' and 업태구분명 not in ('편의점','패스트푸드','아이스크림','백화점','고속도로','떡카페','키즈카페','과자점','철도역구내','유원지','극장','관광호텔','공항') and trim(regexp_replace( 사업장명, '[#|&|"|''|�]', '', 'g')) not in (select trim(regexp_replace(title, '[
|
]','','g')) from cd_ods.tb_cic_naver_result_t ) and trim(regexp_replace( 사업장명, '[#|&|"|''|�]', '', 'g')) not in (select query from cd_ods.tb_cic_naver_result_t ) and trim(regexp_replace( 사업장명, '[#|&|"|''|�]', '', 'g')) not in (select title from cd_ods.tb_cic_processed_name_t ) order by 사업장명 limit 5000 ;

select BRAND_CODE as BRAND_CODE,  REQ_DATE, unnest(ARRAY[0,1,2,3,4,5]) as DATA_GBN 
from cd_ods.tb_fnb_month_brand_price_t
where data_gbn = '0'
and REQ_DATE >= to_char(now() - interval '1 month', 'YYYYMM')
;

select BRAND_CODE as BRAND_CODE,  REQ_DATE, unnest(ARRAY[1,2]) as DATA_GBN 
from cd_ods.tb_fnb_month_brand_price_t
where data_gbn = '0'
and REQ_DATE >= to_char(now() - interval '1 month', 'YYYYMM')
;

select COMP_NAME as COMP_NAME,  REQ_DATE, unnest(ARRAY[0,1,2]) as DATA_GBN 
from cd_ods.tb_fnb_MONTH_BID_RESULT_t
where data_gbn = '0'
and REQ_DATE >= to_char(now() - interval '1 month', 'YYYYMM')
;

select COMP_NAME as COMP_NAME, REQ_DATE, unnest(ARRAY[0,1,2]) as DATA_GBN 
from cd_ods.tb_fnb_MONTH_BID_RESULT_t
where data_gbn = '0'
and REQ_DATE >= to_char(now() - interval '1 month', 'YYYYMM')
;
